expectations.text: uses_impact: Uses the IMPACT() function (not BISTOP or a manual IF expression)
correct_displacement_arg: First arg uses DZ or similar displacement measuring penetration below floor
expectations.evidence: First argument is DZ(PART_CM,0,0), measuring Z displacement of the part CM relative to the global frame

expectations.text: correct_velocity_arg: Second arg uses VZ or matching velocity measure
expectations.evidence: Second argument is VZ(PART_CM,0,0), the Z velocity matching the displacement measure

expectations.text: threshold_at_zero: Threshold value is 0.0 (or equivalent contact point)
expectations.evidence: x1 argument is 0.0, described as 'floor at Z = 0'

expectations.text: correct_params: Stiffness 1e5, exponent 1.5, damping 50, penetration 0.1 all present
expectations.evidence: All four parameters present: k=1E5, e=1.5, cmax=50.0, d=0.1

expectations.text: quoted_expression: Expression wrapped in double quotes as required for FUNCTION= parameter
expectations.evidence: FUNCTION = IMPACT(...) is written without surrounding double quotes in the SFORCE definition
